nasb.text: So these went out from the city, the young men of the rulers of the provinces, and the army which followed them.

esv.text: So these went out of the city, the servants of the governors of the districts and the army that followed them.

cnv.text: 從城裡出來的這些人，就是跟從各省省長的年輕人，軍兵跟在他們後面。

ccb.text: 省长属下的青年军率先出城，大军紧随其后，
